mapper.select: SELECT ttpi.*, ttpsc.courses_nm as trainingTypeNm, ttptc.center_nm as trainingInstituteNm, ttpinst.instructor_nm as trainingInstructorNm, ttptl.location_nm as trainingLocationNm, esg.fn_getapprovalstatus('TRR', ttpi.write_year || ttpi.doc_no) as approval_status, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM esg.tb_approval_info WHERE target_type = 'TRR' AND target_id = ttpi.write_year || ttpi.doc_no || '1' AND type = 'attendee' ) AS result_cnt FROM esg.tb_training_result_report ttpi LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_subject_courses ttpsc ON ttpsc.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttpsc.courses_id = ttpi.training_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_training_center ttptc ON ttptc.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttptc.center_id = ttpi.training_institute LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_instructor ttpinst ON ttpinst.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttpinst.instructor_id = ttpi.training_instructor LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_training_location ttptl ON ttptl.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttptl.location_id = ttpi.training_location WHERE ttpi.comp_id = #{compId} AND ttpi.write_year = #{writeYear} ORDER BY ttpi.use_yn DESC, ttpi.doc_no DESC

SELECT ttpi.*, ttpi.training_start || ' ~ ' || ttpi.training_end AS training_period, ttpih.doc_seq, ttpih.hr_id as id, ttpih.hr_nm as nm, ttpsc.courses_nm as trainingTypeNm, ttptc.center_nm as trainingInstituteNm, ttpinst.instructor_nm as trainingInstructorNm, ttptl.location_nm as trainingLocationNm, plan.title as plan_title, tai.hr_id, tai.hr_nm, toi.orgn_id, toi.orgn_nm, row_number() over(order by ttpih.doc_seq asc) as row_number FROM esg.tb_training_result_report ttpi LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_implementation plan ON ttpi.plan_write_year = plan.write_year AND ttpi.plan_doc_type = plan.doc_type AND ttpi.plan_doc_no = plan.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_subject_courses ttpsc ON ttpsc.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttpsc.courses_id = ttpi.training_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_training_center ttptc ON ttptc.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttptc.center_id = ttpi.training_institute LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_instructor ttpinst ON ttpinst.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttpinst.instructor_id = ttpi.training_instructor LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_training_location ttptl ON ttptl.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttptl.location_id = ttpi.training_location LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_result_report_hr ttpih ON ttpi.doc_no = ttpih.doc_no AND ttpi.doc_type = ttpih.doc_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info tai ON tai.target_id = ttpih.write_year || ttpih.doc_no || '1' AND ttpi.doc_type = ttpih.doc_type and tai.type = 'attendee' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON thi.hr_id = tai.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON toi.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id and toi.orgn_id = thi.orgn_id WHERE ttpi.comp_id = #{compId} AND ttpi.write_year = #{writeYear} AND ttpi.doc_no = #{docNo} AND ttpi.doc_type = #{docType}

select t1.hr_id , t2.hr_nm , t3.orgn_id , t3.orgn_nm from esg.tb_training_plan_implementation_learner t1 left join esg.tb_hr_info t2 on t1.hr_id = t2.hr_id left join esg.tb_orgn_info t3 on t2.orgn_id = t3.orgn_id where write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType} and doc_no = #{docNo}
SELECT FILE_ID, FILE_NM AS FILE_NAME, FILE_SIZE, FILE_TYPE AS DOC_TYPE, "extension" FROM ESG.TB_SYS_FILE WHERE TARGET_ID = CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}) AND TARGET_TYPE = #{docType}
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_training_result_report WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_training_result_report ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comp_id, title, training_date, training_start, training_end, training_type, budget, required_details, training_goal, expected_effect, materials_etc, materials, projector, vtr, training_content, training_institute, training_instructor, training_location, qna_yn, report_yn, delivery_training_yn, test_yn, effectiveness_etc, good_condition, normal_condition, no_concern, remark, plan_doc_type, plan_doc_no, plan_write_year, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{compId}, #{title}, #{trainingDate}, #{trainingStart}, #{trainingEnd}, #{trainingType}, #{budget}, #{requiredDetails}, #{trainingGoal}, #{expectedEffect}, #{materialsEtc}, #{materials}, #{projector}, #{vtr}, #{trainingContent}, #{trainingInstitute}, #{trainingInstructor}, #{trainingLocation}, #{qnaYn}, #{reportYn}, #{deliveryTrainingYn}, #{testYn}, #{effectivenessEtc}, COALESCE(#{goodCondition}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{normalCondition}, 'N'), COALESCE(#{noConcern}, 'N'), #{remark}, #{planDocType}, #{planDocNo}, #{planWriteYear}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_training_result_report_hr WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_training_result_report_hr ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, doc_seq, hr_id, hr_nm, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{docSeq}, #{id}, #{nm}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_training_result_report SET title = #{title}, training_date = #{trainingDate}, training_start = #{trainingStart}, training_End = #{trainingEnd}, training_type = #{trainingType}, budget = #{budget}, required_details = #{requiredDetails}, training_goal = #{trainingGoal}, expected_effect = #{expectedEffect}, materials_etc = #{materialsEtc}, materials = #{materials}, projector = #{projector}, vtr = #{vtr}, training_content = #{trainingContent}, training_institute = #{trainingInstitute}, training_instructor = #{trainingInstructor}, training_location = #{trainingLocation}, qna_yn = #{qnaYn}, report_yn = #{reportYn}, delivery_training_yn = #{deliveryTrainingYn}, test_yn = #{testYn}, effectiveness_etc = #{effectivenessEtc}, good_condition = #{goodCondition}, normal_condition = #{normalCondition}, no_concern = #{noConcern}, remark = #{remark}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_type = #{docType}
mapper.select: SELECT ttrr.*, case when taia.signature is not null then 'Y' when taiR.signature is not null then 'I' when taiw.signature is not null then 'W' else 'C' end as approvalStatus FROM esg.tb_training_result_report ttrr LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info taiw ON taiw.target_type = 'TRR' AND taiw.target_id = ttrr.write_year || ttrr.doc_no AND taiw.param = 'writer' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info tair ON tair.target_type = 'TRR' AND tair.target_id = ttrr.write_year || ttrr.doc_no AND tair.param = 'reviewer' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info taia ON taia.target_type = 'TRR' AND taia.target_id = ttrr.write_year || ttrr.doc_no AND taia.param = 'approver' WHERE ttrr.comp_id = #{compId} AND ttrr.doc_type = 'TRR' AND ( ( ttrr.write_year = (#{writeYear}::integer -1)::varchar AND ttrr.use_yn = 'Y' ) OR ttrr.write_year = #{writeYear} ) ORDER BY ttrr.use_yn DESC, ttrr.write_year, ttrr.doc_no DESC
